post.description:
Browse for content: Music library (A), share(S:), Sonos playlists(SQ:), Sonos favorites(FV:2), radio stations(R:0/0), radio shows(R:0/1), queue(Q:)). Recommendation: Send one request, check the `TotalMatches` and - if necessary - do additional requests with higher `StartingIndex`. In case of duplicates only the first is returned! Example: albums with same title, even if artists are different

See [action description](https://sonos.svrooij.io/services/content-directory#browse) for more details

newSleepTimerDuration.description: Time to stop after, as `hh:mm:ss` or empty string to cancel

roomUUID.description: The UUID of the speaker you want this alarm for

programMetaData.description: The sound metadata, can be empty string

includeLinkedZones.description: Should grouped players also play the alarm?

assignedID.description: The ID of the new alarm

enqueuedURIMetaDataObject.description: Generate EnqueuedURIMetaData xml from Didl data

newCoordinator.description: uuid of the new coordinator - must be in same group

rejoinGroup.description: Should former coordinator rejoin the group?

currentValue.description: Booleans return `1` / `0`, rest number as specified

remainingSleepTimerDuration.description: Format hh:mm:ss or empty string if not set

htAudioIn.description: SPDIF input, `0` not connected / `2` stereo / `7` Dolby 2.0 / `18` dolby 5.1 / `21` not listening / `22` silence

id.description: The ID of the alarm see ListAlarms

roomUUID.description: The UUID of the speaker you want this alarm for

programMetaData.description: The sound metadata, can be empty string

includeLinkedZones.description: Should grouped players also play the alarm?

enqueuedURIsAndMetaDataObject.description: Generate EnqueuedURIsAndMetaData xml from Didl data

programMetaDataObject.description: Generate ProgramMetaData xml from Didl data

target.description: Position of track in queue (start at 1) or `hh:mm:ss` for `REL_TIME` or `+/-hh:mm:ss` for `TIME_DELTA`

currentURI.description: The new TransportURI - its a special SONOS format

currentURIMetaData.description: Track Metadata, see MetadataHelper.GuessTrack to guess based on track uri

currentURIMetaDataObject.description: Generate CurrentURIMetaData xml from Didl data

desiredValue.description: Booleans required `1` for true or `0` for false, rest number as specified

nextURIMetaDataObject.description: Generate NextURIMetaData xml from Didl data

variableName.description: The key for this variable, use something unique

uuid.description: The unique identifier of the Sonos device.

name.description: The name of the Sonos device.

SonosDevice.description: Represents a Sonos device with a unique identifier and a name.

id.description: Sonos group id, will change if you change anything to this group

coordinator.description: The player responsible for the queue

members.description: All the members in this group

SonosGroup.description: Sonos group, consisting of a coordinator and zero or more members
